apps.name: Unleashed
apps.subtitle: Flipper Zero BLE companion
apps.localizedDescription: Native companion for Flipper Zero on tumoflip/Unleashed firmware. Files & folder upload, screen mirror + remote, Sub-GHz TX and NFC/RFID emulate via the companion .fap, Sber relay failsafe (HA -> Sber cloud), Marauder log analysis, and an all-the-plugins auto-updater.
apps.versionDescription: Device info screen (model, firmware, region, radio stack, battery + full property dump) like the official app. Auto-sync: installed-apps list refreshes itself after any install/update/upload/delete.

versions.localizedDescription: Device info screen (model, firmware, region, radio stack, battery + full property dump) like the official app. Auto-sync: installed-apps list refreshes itself after any install/update/upload/delete.
Protected apps moved to their own screen (lock.shield row in Updates). Unprotect is now a deliberate left-swipe instead of a one-tap minus, so apps can't be unprotected by accident.
Fix: BLE file-write pacing (large app installs no longer silently fail) + install failures now verified by md5 and reported, not hidden behind a fake success.
Fix: Device tab stop-scan button now actually stops the scan (state reset).
Installed apps: sort by Name/Size (Flipper FS has no per-file mtime, so no install-date sort). Use Updates history for install records.
Installed apps: sort by Name / Size / Time (install time = .fap mtime on SD).
Installed apps: sort by 'recently installed' to find the last-added app. Timestamp via storage RPC.
